ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racial category */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sex category */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count for the given demographic category */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area (e.g., city, state, country) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the population */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group of the population */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the population */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was entered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racial category */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the racial category */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the racial category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex category */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex category */,
  "gender_identity" TEXT /* Gender identity of the sex category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the age group */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, private) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL for the data source */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person for the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being measured */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Data quality score (e.g., 0.0-1.0) */,
  "quality_description" TEXT /* Description of the data quality metric */,
  "quality_checked_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who checked the data quality */,
  "quality_checked_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data quality was checked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, policymaker) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_duration" REAL /* Duration of the analysis */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis being visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image of the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis being reported */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  "report_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being granted permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being granted the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being granted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
